Song {
    metadata: Metadata {
        title: None,
        subtitles: [],
        artists: [],
        composers: [],
        lyricists: [],
        album: None,
        year: None,
        key: None,
        tempo: None,
        capo: None,
        custom: [],
    },
    lines: [
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "title",
                value: Some(
                    "Amazing Grace",
                ),
            },
        ),
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "subtitle",
                value: Some(
                    "A Hymn",
                ),
            },
        ),
        Comment(
            "Traditional",
        ),
    ],
}
